title: dryopteris cognata
intro: Dryopteris cognata, also known as the Queensland strap fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used to treat colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
